title: stdout is not flushed in healthckeck
body:
### Issue Description

When using healthcheck at podman compose it doesnt show the output of curl

```
healthcheck:
      test: curl -sSf http://webpy:8000/healthcheck || exit 1
```

for output the result I have to append `echo`

```
healthcheck:
      test: curl -sSf http://webpy:8000/healthcheck && echo || exit 1
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

run podman compose with 

```
healthcheck:
      test: curl -sSf http://webpy:8000/healthcheck || exit 1
```

### Describe the results you received

No output in the container logs
{      
      "Start": "2024-08-11T17:28:50.911061254-04:00",
      "End": "2024-08-11T17:28:51.216155453-04:00",
      "ExitCode": 0,
      "Output": ""
    }

### Describe the results you expected

output the response of the request

{
      "Start": "2024-08-11T17:28:50.911061254-04:00",
      "End": "2024-08-11T17:28:51.216155453-04:00",
      "ExitCode": 0,
      "Output": "{\"status\":\"OK\"}"
    }
